metadata.author: Sana Asif Ahmad
metadata.description: AI governance adoption data for Global South countries
data_sources: UN Development Coordination Office policy briefs
metadata.schema_note: v2.0 (index methodology): implementation overall_score is now a DETERMINISTIC weighted sum of six in-force indicators (audit-verifiable). adoption_status standardized to rubric bands (none/low/partial/high). Brazil, India, Kenya are fully EVIDENCE-CODED with per-indicator citations; the other 13 are PROVISIONAL (coding_status field) pending the same treatment. See METHODOLOGY.md.

eu_ai_act.notes: Digital India Act draft incorporates risk-based approach but diverges on high-risk categories

source.primary_instrument: Digital India Act (draft, 2023); National Strategy for AI (NITI Aayog, 2018)

unesco_ai_ethics.notes: Formally endorsed UNESCO recommendation; implementing through MeitY guidelines

source.primary_instrument: Digital India Act (draft, 2023); National Strategy for AI (NITI Aayog, 2018)

oecd_ai_principles.notes: G20 AI Principles adopted; implementation varies by sector

source.primary_instrument: Digital India Act (draft, 2023); National Strategy for AI (NITI Aayog, 2018)

has_enforcement_body.evidence: No statutory AI regulator; AI Governance Group is advisory; sectoral regulators only.

has_regulatory_sandbox.evidence: No operational national AI-specific regulatory sandbox (sectoral fintech sandboxes only).

has_impact_assessments.evidence: Nov-2025 India AI Governance Guidelines are voluntary; no mandatory AI impact assessment.

has_transparency_requirements.evidence: Transparency obligations proposed in draft bill / guidelines; not binding AI law.

has_audit_mechanisms.evidence: Bias audits proposed in the 2025 AI (Ethics & Accountability) Bill, not enacted.

has_redress_mechanisms.evidence: Grievance mechanisms proposed; no AI-specific statutory redress in force.

risk_classification.divergence_notes: Agricultural AI considered critical infrastructure, not in EU high-risk list

key_developments.event: Regulatory sandbox for AI startups launched

eu_ai_act.notes: AI Bill (PL 2338/2023) closely mirrors EU AI Act risk categories

source.primary_instrument: AI Bill PL 2338/2023; Brazilian AI Strategy (EBIA, 2021)

unesco_ai_ethics.notes: Strong alignment with human rights approach

source.primary_instrument: AI Bill PL 2338/2023; Brazilian AI Strategy (EBIA, 2021)

oecd_ai_principles.notes: OECD member; principles embedded in national strategy

source.primary_instrument: AI Bill PL 2338/2023; Brazilian AI Strategy (EBIA, 2021)

has_enforcement_body.evidence: PL 2338/2023 not yet enacted (in Chamber of Deputies, 2025); SIA / ANPD-coordinator model not in force.

has_regulatory_sandbox.evidence: ANPD ran a pilot regulatory sandbox on AI and data protection.

has_impact_assessments.evidence: Algorithmic impact assessment is mandated by PL 2338 but the bill is not in force.

has_transparency_requirements.evidence: AI-specific transparency duties depend on PL 2338, not yet law.

has_audit_mechanisms.evidence: No in-force third-party AI audit requirement.

has_redress_mechanisms.evidence: AI-specific redress depends on PL 2338, not yet law.

risk_classification.divergence_notes: Adds environmental impact as consideration for high-risk classification

source.primary_instrument: Kenya National AI Strategy (2025); Data Protection Act 2019
Kenya National AI Strategy (2025); Data Protection Act 2019

has_enforcement_body.evidence: Implementation Secretariat being established; no AI regulator in force.

has_regulatory_sandbox.evidence: Data sandboxes 'expected to be created'; not yet operational.

has_impact_assessments.evidence: No mandatory AI impact assessment in force.

has_transparency_requirements.evidence: No binding AI transparency requirement; AI Bill 2026 still under debate.

has_audit_mechanisms.evidence: Regulators reported to 'lack capabilities to audit and monitor' AI.

has_redress_mechanisms.evidence: No AI-specific redress channel in force.

risk_classification.divergence_notes: Mobile money and agricultural AI prioritized as high-risk given economic importance

unesco_ai_ethics.notes: Active participant in UNESCO AI discussions

source.primary_instrument: AI Agenda Mexico; OECD membership instruments

oecd_ai_principles.notes: OECD member; principles embedded in strategy

source.primary_instrument: AI Agenda Mexico; OECD membership instruments

has_enforcement_body.evidence: CONAIA (National AI Commission) would be created by the proposed Federal Law Regulating AI, still under discussion in the Senate; not yet established.

has_regulatory_sandbox.evidence: AI sandboxes are expected to be introduced by the pending AI law; no AI-specific sandbox operational.

has_impact_assessments.evidence: Algorithmic Impact Assessments are mandated only by the proposed AI law (high-risk systems); law not yet enacted.

has_transparency_requirements.evidence: AI transparency duties depend on the pending Federal Law Regulating AI; not in force.

has_audit_mechanisms.evidence: No in-force third-party AI audit requirement.

has_redress_mechanisms.evidence: AI-specific redress depends on the pending AI law; not in force.

risk_classification.divergence_notes: Border/migration AI highly prioritized given US-Mexico dynamics

key_developments.event: AI ethics guidelines for federal government
